name: nyan-note
description: にゃん・ノート Capacitor Android prototype

scripts.prepare:android-web: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www/public && cp index.html app.js styles.css manifest.json privacy.html terms.html rescue.html auth-test.html sw.js www/ && cp -R public/. www/public/
scripts.cap:sync:android: npm run prepare:android-web && npx cap sync android
